message:
fix: auto-save downloads to ~/Downloads/ on Linux instead of silent deletion

On Linux, the GUI file picker (zenity/kdialog) fails silently in
headless/SSH sessions, causing downloads to be saved to a temp file
and immediately deleted. Fix by:

- Adding handleDownloadWillBeginAsync to register downloads without
  blocking on a GUI picker (Linux only)
- Falling back to ~/Downloads/{filename} when no save path is set
- Showing a brief "Saved: {path}" notification in the toolbar for 3s
- macOS behavior unchanged (native osascript picker still used)
